message:
refactor(lto): auto-detect LLVM from common paths

Changes:
- Auto-detect LLVM from LLVM_PATH env or common locations:
  - macOS: /opt/homebrew/opt/llvm@{20,18}, /usr/local/opt/llvm
  - Linux: /usr/lib/llvm-{20,18}, /usr
- Detect CPU arch for llc (aarch64 vs x86-64)
- Clear message showing which LLVM path is used
- Gracefully skip LTO if no LLVM found

Install LLVM:
  macOS:  brew install llvm@20
  Ubuntu: apt install llvm-20
  Custom: export LLVM_PATH=/path/to/llvm

Output binary only links to libSystem (no LLVM dependency)
